Ignite your FIRE to become the best version of yourself ! I’ve found my fire, have you? 🔥

I’m proud to announce myself as the Global Brand Ambassador for FIRE-BOLTT, India’s No.1 Smartwatch Brand @fireboltt_

I love that Fireboltt is helping India become fitter, look smarter and work faster.

Here’s your chance to #FindYourFire and become a part of our clan by participating in the massive 1000 SMARTWATCH GIVEAWAY ‼️

Just #FollowFireboltt and participate in the contest running on their page and you can win a free smartwatch 🔥

You can also AVAIL 10% OFF using my code “VIRAT01” on www.fireboltt.com

 #FIREBOLTT #FINDYOURFIRE #WATCHoutfortheBEST #Giveaway #ad

node.text:
I couldn't explain the mutual trust, respect and understanding we share better than these two videos I'm posting here today.
The first one explains perfectly well who he is , selfless in the most intense moments. 
The second one is about the kind of trust & chemistry we had over the years while batting together. In this moment I was only focused on his call & I knew we both would be able to make those 2 runs because of the trust we shared in one another. He called & I put my head down and ran ! 
Mutual respect and understanding isn't a thing of chance, it develops naturally when two individuals are aligned & have the same vision and for us, that vision was always to make India win ! Thank you for all these memories skip. 🇮🇳💙@mahi7781

video credit- @starsportsindia @icc

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗻𝗱𝘀𝗲𝘁 𝗼𝗳 𝗮 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗺𝗽𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗳𝘁. 𝗩𝗶𝗿𝗮𝘁 𝗞𝗼𝗵𝗹𝗶 😇

Discipline, self-belief, consistency, the mental and lifestyle adjustments that he had to make, hunger to perform, setting high standards for himself and the rest of the team - watch Virat Kohli’s masterclass, on what it takes to deliver 𝘗𝘦𝘢𝘬 𝘗𝘦𝘳𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘮𝘢𝘯𝘤𝘦 at the highest level, only on the RCB Podcast. 🎬🎙️

#PlayBold #ನಮ್ಮRCB

node.text:
About twenty-five years ago, a man took a bet on a boy. My first coach, Rajkumar Sharma sir (@rajkumarcricket ), who taught me everything I know.
Seam XVIII is a tribute to cricket and the first pair belongs to the coach who made it all possible.
I’ve held trophies, I’ve lifted cups. But handing sir this box hit different. This is my way of thanking the man who taught me the game that gave me everything.
Thank you, Sir. Always.

node.text: Champions once again ⭐️⭐️⭐️. Phenomenal victory for us in the big final at Ahmedabad. Great character shown by the boys under pressure throughout the tournament and absolutely no one could come close to this talented bunch of players. Congratulations to the whole management and the whole support staff group for being part of this amazing feat. Very well deserved. Jai Hind 🇮🇳❤️

node.text:
Alibaug just keeps getting better. Excited to see Ananta by Avās ( @avaswellness ) come to life. With the Avās Racquet Club now featuring padel, pickleball, and tennis courts, along with a top-notch recovery centre complementing the Avās Wellness Club, this truly feels like a game-changer. Can’t wait to spend more time here!

#Ad #avaswellness #anantabyavas #avasracquetclub #baughofwonders
